prompt: Create an intimate, photorealistic close-up portrait of a young couple kissing at sunset, framed vertically in a 3:4 aspect ratio. The man is on the left in profile, wearing a backward black baseball cap with a small white side logo and a dark green hoodie; he has a close fade haircut, short trimmed beard, eyes closed, and warm skin lit by golden hour light. The woman is on the right in profile, wearing a backward white baseball cap and an oversized cream sweatshirt; she has long straight dark hair, eyes closed, glossy lips, and pale manicured nails. Her two hands gently cup the back of his neck and jaw as they kiss, conveying tenderness and romance. Use shallow depth of field with a soft blurred outdoor background, warm orange sunset glow on the left, dark amber shadows, cinematic bokeh, natural skin texture, realistic clothing folds, and a cozy urban evening mood. No visible text except the small cap logo, no extra people, no exaggerated posing, no watermark.
promptEn: Create an intimate, photorealistic close-up portrait of a young couple kissing at sunset, framed vertically in a 3:4 aspect ratio. The man is on the left in profile, wearing a backward black baseball cap with a small white side logo and a dark green hoodie; he has a close fade haircut, short trimmed beard, eyes closed, and warm skin lit by golden hour light. The woman is on the right in profile, wearing a backward white baseball cap and an oversized cream sweatshirt; she has long straight dark hair, eyes closed, glossy lips, and pale manicured nails. Her two hands gently cup the back of his neck and jaw as they kiss, conveying tenderness and romance. Use shallow depth of field with a soft blurred outdoor background, warm orange sunset glow on the left, dark amber shadows, cinematic bokeh, natural skin texture, realistic clothing folds, and a cozy urban evening mood. No visible text except the small cap logo, no extra people, no exaggerated posing, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张写实风格的亲密特写肖像，描绘一对年轻情侣在日落时分接吻，采用 3:4 竖构图。画面左侧的男性呈侧面，戴着一顶反戴的 黑色 棒球帽，帽侧带有小巧的白色标志，身穿深绿色连帽衫；他留着利落的渐变短发和修剪整齐的短胡须，双眼紧闭，温暖的肤色在黄金时刻的阳光下熠熠生辉。画面右侧的女性呈侧面，戴着一顶反戴的 白色 棒球帽，身穿一件超大款的 米色 卫衣；她留着黑色长直发，双眼紧闭，嘴唇光泽，指甲修剪整齐且呈浅色。她双手温柔地捧着男方的后颈和下颚，两人深情接吻，传递出温柔与浪漫的气息。采用浅景深效果，背景为柔和模糊的户外环境，左侧映衬着温暖的橙色夕阳余晖，伴有深琥珀色的阴影、电影级光斑、自然的皮肤纹理、逼真的衣物褶皱，营造出舒适的都市夜晚氛围。画面中除帽子上的小标志外无任何文字，无其他人物，无夸张姿势，无水印。
